# MiOS-DEV
> AI Ingestion Index (Snapshot v0.1.3)
> Single Source of Truth: https://github.com/Kabuki94/MiOS-bootstrap/blob/main/INDEX.md

MiOS-DEV is a bootc-based, self-building, immutable workstation OS on Fedora Rawhide. It uses a Unified Kernel Image (UKI), SELinux build-time compilation, and a FOSS-priority AI API agnostic layer.

## [BUILD] Architecture & Laws
- [INDEX.md](https://github.com/Kabuki94/MiOS-bootstrap/blob/main/INDEX.md) - Single Source of Truth (Architecture Laws)
- [AI-AGENT-GUIDE.md](https://github.com/Kabuki94/MiOS-bootstrap/blob/main/AI-AGENT-GUIDE.md) - Instructions for coding agents
- [ai-context.json](https://github.com/Kabuki94/MiOS-bootstrap/blob/main/ai-context.json) - Machine-readable system context map

## [DIR] Core Manifests (Machine Readable)
- [Root-Manifest](https://github.com/Kabuki94/MiOS-bootstrap/blob/main/root-manifest.json) - Top-level file map
- [Automation-Manifest](https://github.com/Kabuki94/MiOS-bootstrap/blob/main/automation/manifest.json) - Build & config scripts
- [Specs-Manifest](https://github.com/Kabuki94/MiOS-bootstrap/blob/main/specs/manifest.json) - Architectural blueprints & research
- [Config-Manifest](https://github.com/Kabuki94/MiOS-bootstrap/blob/main/config/manifest.json) - Deployment templates
- [Usr-Manifest](https://github.com/Kabuki94/MiOS-bootstrap/blob/main/usr/manifest.json) - Linux-native system tree (templates)

## [TECH] AI Integration & Redirects
- [Unified-AI-Redirects](https://github.com/Kabuki94/MiOS-bootstrap/blob/main/specs/ai-integration/2026-04-27-Artifact-AI-006-Unified-Redirects.md) - Agnostic API protocols
- [RAG-Integration](https://github.com/Kabuki94/MiOS-bootstrap/blob/main/specs/ai-integration/2026-04-27-Artifact-AI-001-RAG-Integration.md) - Knowledge base sync
- [Prompts-Library](https://github.com/Kabuki94/MiOS-bootstrap/blob/main/specs/ai-integration/2026-04-27-Artifact-AI-003-Prompts-Library.md) - System initialization patterns

## [RES] Research Presets
- [Bootc-Advances](https://github.com/Kabuki94/MiOS-bootstrap/blob/main/specs/knowledge/research/2026-04-26-Artifact-KBX-01-bootc-ecosystem-advances-2025-2026.md)
- [GPU-Passthrough](https://github.com/Kabuki94/MiOS-bootstrap/blob/main/specs/knowledge/research/2026-04-26-Artifact-KBX-10-vfio-gpu-passthrough-fedora-2025.md)
- [OpenAI-Ingestion](https://github.com/Kabuki94/MiOS-bootstrap/blob/main/specs/knowledge/research/2026-04-26-Artifact-KBX-024-OpenAI-Integration.md)
